title: More_origins
description: Adds more origins to the origins mod
body:
# More origins
This mod ads more origins to the origins mod - perfect if you are bored of the ones included in the OG origins mod.

## Origins:

### Baby dragon
  - you are a small dragon that can fly

### Dragon
  - you are a big giant that can fky

### Firedragon
  - you are a drangon that can shoot fireballs

### Enderdragon
  - you have most of the abilities of the enderdragon mob

### Ghast
  - you have the abilities of the ghast mob

### Happy ghast
  - you have the abilities of the happy ghast mob

### Giant
  - big by default

### Dwarf
  - small by default

### Size shifter
  - alows the person with this origin to shrink or grow



## Dependencies
This mod requires that you have both the Origins mod for either fabric or forge and that you have the pehkui mod installed
